publishedAbstract: - Why don't the `ODF` `pods` start properly after the `CNI` migration towards `OVN-Kubernetes`? ~~~ $ oc get events-n openshift-storage | grep-v Normal | grep error adding container to network "nad-name": failed to create macvlan: device or resource busy <---- ~~~- Why is not the assigned `interface` from `net-attach-def` available in the `node`? ~~~ $ oc get net-attach-def-n openshift-storage-oyaml spec: config: '{"cniVersion": "0.3.1", "type": "macvlan", "master": "bond0" <-----, "mode": "bridge", "ipam": {"type": "whereabouts", "range": "xxx.xxx.1.0/24"}}' ~~~
publishedTitle: CNI migration towards OVN-Kubernetes affects RHODF nad assigned to the primary interface
